note: Stage-0 instrument validation (IRV-001 / IPV-001). Intents are split into two BANDS. band='anchored' — constitutional/governance/delegation/standing/personhood/consequence/reasoning/evaluation intents whose load-bearing properties the invariant corpus DENSELY covers; these measure ENGINE QUALITY and run FIRST (so --limit N picks them). band='breadth' — cross-domain intents (finance/legal/medical/engineering/science/…) the corpus does NOT yet cover in domain specifics; these measure CORPUS BREADTH, not engine quality, and will score low coverage by construction (the corpus has no debt-service-ratio invariant). Keep the headline shakedown on the anchored band; use the breadth band only as a labeled desert probe (2026-07-18 operator direction: anchor tests where we have a sufficient corpus). The `personas` are Synthetic Expert Baseline (SEB) roles — NOT a Delphi panel (correlated models); ENGINEERING calibration, not scientific validation. CRITICAL: persona prompts must never use the word 'invariant'.

seb.extraction_instruction: Identify the smallest set of properties that fundamentally determine successful reasoning for this task — the structural properties that cannot change without changing the correct answer. For each property give: the property (short noun phrase), why it is load-bearing, your confidence (0-1), and what you would explicitly exclude as non-determinative. Do NOT use the word 'invariant'. Return JSON: {"properties":[{"property":"...","why":"...","confidence":0.0,"excludes":"..."}]}.
seb.consensus_instruction: You are aggregating several independent experts' property lists for one task. Produce the consensus set: merge near-duplicates, keep a property if >=2 experts named it OR one named it with confidence >=0.8, and record how many experts named each. Return JSON: {"consensus":[{"property":"...","named_by":N,"mean_confidence":0.0}]}.

intents.intent: Decide whether a delegated agent may carry out a request that would extend its authority beyond what its principal granted.
Determine what a human principal always retains that can never be transferred to any delegate or automated representative.
Decide how much confidence to place in a declaration whose author has high standing but whose specific claim is new and unverified.
Decide whether an autonomous agent's proposed action is consequential enough to require human escalation and a durable review record before it executes.
Verify that a participant in a governed action is a unique human, without exposing who they are.
Determine what record a consequential automated action must produce so it remains auditable and tamper-evident after the fact.
Determine what evidence must accumulate before a proposed rule may become authoritative in a constitutional system.
Decide what makes a piece of reasoning reusable across many different problems rather than valid only for the one it was produced for.
Decide the minimal set of controls a comparative claim needs to be credible to an adversarial skeptic.
Determine a fair settlement rail and value ceiling for an agent-executed procurement under delegated authority.
Assess the creditworthiness of a small-to-medium enterprise applying for a working-capital loan.
Decide whether to approve a cross-border B2B payment flagged for elevated fraud risk.
Evaluate whether a data-processing arrangement between two firms is lawful under a minimum-disclosure privacy regime.
Assess whether a bounded digital representative may lawfully enter a commercial agreement on behalf of its principal.
Prepare a patient for a specialist appointment without providing a diagnosis.
Decide whether a clinical decision-support recommendation is safe to surface to a non-clinician.
Decide whether a proposed change to a deployed software system is safe to release.
Assess the downstream impact of superseding a shared configuration value used across many services.
Judge whether an experimental result is strong enough to publish as a finding.
Determine whether a piece of public information is trustworthy enough to act on.
Price a gated digital good across multiple payment rails while preserving parity.
Decide how to allocate an operator's scarce attention across competing time-sensitive demands.
Design a learning path that moves a novice toward autonomous competence in a domain.
Evaluate whether an offset claim genuinely reduces net emissions.
Assess whether a supplier can be trusted for a critical, time-sensitive component.
